test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient: source-contract checks in tests/tactical/FTacticalBattleDisplayFireFlowTest.cpp lock the absence of prior max-height retention and confirm resize handlers stay layout-only, while tests/gui/TacticalGuiLiveTest.cpp drives the selected-ship move path narrow and back wide to prove immediate reflow and shrink-back. Verifier rerun: TacticalTests OK (152 tests), GuiTests OK (35 tests).
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate: doc/UsersGuide.md and doc/DesignNotes.md both match the shipped immediate resize reflow, current-geometry height recomputation, and lower-panel shrink-back behavior; no extra documentation update is needed.
